name: whatsapp-mcp
description: Local MCP server for WhatsApp on macOS: persistent Baileys daemon, draft-staging with thread-context snapshots, hold-to-fire approval. Sibling to imessage-mcp. Designed for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Codex CLI.
author: whatsapp-mcp contributors

scripts.build:daemon: bun build src/daemon/index.ts --compile --outfile bin/whatsapp-daemon --external jimp --external sharp --external link-preview-js --external audio-decode
scripts.build: bun run build:mcp && bun run build:daemon
